plugin.name: Esprito Spring Tools
plugin.description:
Esprito Spring Tools is an IntelliJ IDEA (Community Edition) plugin designed to enhance your experience with the Spring Framework.

Key Features Include:

  • Autocompletion: Autocomplete bean names and navigate through annotations, linking to relevant classes and files.
  • Simplified Configuration: Make working with .properties and .yaml files more efficient through our advanced autocomplete and navigation features.
  • Easy Navigation: Quickly find your way through your project's Spring architecture, improving code understanding.
  • Smart Inspections: Spot and fix common Spring issues early with our targeted checks and fixes.
  • JPQL Support: Maximize your efficiency in JPQL with syntax highlighting and detailed navigation options.
  • Kotlin Support: We support Kotlin, enhancing your Spring projects with seamless integration.
  • Code Folding: Automatically show expected variable values from properties files, simplifying code readability and focus.
  • Spring Events Navigation: Easily move between event publishers and listeners, making your event handling straightforward.

Esprito Spring Tools is designed to significantly increase your productivity and accelerate the development of Spring Boot applications.

This plugin is available for free for non-commercial use. For more details, see homepage.
